query: What's the weather like in Lisbon today?
expected_facts: Current temperature
Current condition (e.g., sunny, raining)

query: Vai chover amanhã em Lisboa?
expected_facts: Precipitation probability for tomorrow
Temperature min/max

query: Are there any weather warnings active right now?
expected_facts: Status of weather warnings (Yellow/Orange/Red or None)

query: Should I bring a jacket if I'm visiting Lisbon this Friday?
expected_facts: Friday's exact temperature forecast
Conclusion if a jacket makes sense

query: What will the weather be like in Lisbon on December 25th 2030?
expected_facts: System cannot forecast weather that far in advance
IPMA forecast limit is 5 days
expected_behavior: Inform user that IPMA forecast is limited to 5 days and cannot predict weather for 2030

query: Como está o vento hoje?
expected_facts: Current wind speed
Current wind direction

query: What's the weather in Porto?
expected_facts: System only covers the Lisbon Metropolitan Area
expected_behavior: Inform user that the system only covers the Lisbon Metropolitan Area (AML)

query: Tell me the UV index for today.
expected_facts: UV index is not currently tracked/provided by IPMA
expected_behavior: Inform user that UV index is not available through IPMA API data

query: How cold will it get tonight?
expected_facts: Minimum temperature for tonight/today

query: Há alertas meteorológicos para o fim de semana?
expected_facts: Information regarding any IPMA warnings
Weekend forecast overview

query: Is it safe to go sailing tomorrow?
expected_facts: Wind conditions for tomorrow
Any active sea/wind warnings
expected_behavior: Check wind and sea warnings, advise based on conditions

query: Qual é a temperatura média em agosto?
expected_facts: IPMA tool only provides 5-day forecasts, not historical climate averages
expected_behavior: Inform user that IPMA provides forecasts only, not historical climate averages

query: Give me a Portugal-wide weather overview for today.
expected_facts: Overview for multiple Portugal locations
Lisbon included in the national weather overview

query: Is the metro working correctly right now?
expected_facts: Status of Amarela, Azul, Verde, Vermelha lines (Normal/Disrupted)

query: How do I get from Baixa-Chiado to Aeroporto?
expected_facts: Start at Baixa-Chiado (Azul/Verde lines)
Take Verde line to Alameda, transfer to Vermelha line
Ride Vermelha line to Aeroporto (terminal station)
Alternative: Azul line to São Sebastião, transfer to Vermelha

query: Qual é o próximo comboio de Entrecampos para Sintra?
expected_facts: Departure times for Sintra line from Entrecampos
Entrecampos is on the Linha de Sintra (CP Urbanos)

query: When is the next bus 736 at Marques de Pombal?
expected_facts: ETA or scheduled time for bus 736
Stop name near Marquês de Pombal

query: What is the fastest way from Oriente to Marquês de Pombal?
expected_facts: Vermelha line from Oriente to São Sebastião
Transfer at São Sebastião to Azul (Blue) line
Azul line one stop to Marquês de Pombal
Estimated travel time (~15-20 minutes)

query: How long do I have to wait for the green line at Cais do Sodre?
expected_facts: Real-time wait time in minutes/seconds for the next train in Telheiras direction (usually 1st and 2nd next trains)

query: Quero ir para o Porto de comboio a partir de Santa Apolónia.
expected_facts: System only covers Lisbon Metropolitan Area (Sintra, Cascais, Azambuja, Sado lines)
expected_behavior: Inform user that only AML suburban lines are covered (Sintra, Cascais, Azambuja, Sado)

query: Are there any service alerts for Carris Metropolitana today?
expected_facts: Summary of active alerts or confirmation that none exist
Carris Metropolitana is the suburban bus network serving the Lisbon Metropolitan Area

query: How do I get from Hogwarts to Narnia using public transport?
expected_facts: Stations/locations are fictitious and do not exist in the Lisbon transport network
Agent should recognize these are not real places and inform the user
expected_behavior: Recognize fictitious locations and inform user they do not exist in Lisbon's network

query: Is the tram 28E running?
expected_facts: Information about the 28E tram route
Route connects Martim Moniz to Campo de Ourique (Prazeres)
Approximately 35-38 stops, ~50-58 minutes journey

query: What's the wait time at station XPTO?
expected_facts: Station XPTO is not recognized in the Lisbon Metro network
expected_behavior: Recognize that station XPTO does not exist in the Metro network

query: I am at GPS 38.7223, -9.1393. Where is the nearest metro?
expected_facts: Name of the nearest metro station (e.g. Marquês de Pombal or Avenida)
Approximate distance
expected_behavior: Use GPS coordinates to find nearest metro station

query: Where can I catch the Fertagus train?
expected_facts: System does not currently integrate Fertagus schedules (only CP, Carris, Metro)
expected_behavior: Inform user that Fertagus is not currently integrated (only CP, Carris, Metro)

query: Como vou de Odivelas para Telheiras de metro?
expected_facts: Amarela (Yellow) line from Odivelas towards Rato
Transfer at Campo Grande to Verde (Green) line
Verde line towards Telheiras (terminal station)

query: Tell me about the history of Castelo de São Jorge
expected_facts: Originally a Moorish fortress (Alcáçova), built 10th-11th century
Reconquered on October 25, 1147 by D. Afonso Henriques (first King of Portugal)
Siege lasted ~4 months with aid of Crusaders (Second Crusade)
Served as royal palace from 13th to 16th century

query: Onde fica a farmácia mais próxima do Rossio?
expected_facts: Name and location of a pharmacy near Rossio/Baixa

query: I'm trying to find official open data about municipal car parks in Lisbon. Which datasets should I look at?
expected_facts: Identification of EMEL or parking datasets in Lisboa Aberta
Datasets from dados.gov.pt or lisboaaberta.cm-lisboa.pt

query: Is the Oceanário included in the Lisboa Card?
expected_facts: Oceanário de Lisboa offers a 15% discount with the Lisboa Card (NOT free entry)
The Lisboa Card provides free entry to 50+ other museums/attractions

expected_behavior: Refuse to hallucinate; only recommend real, verified places from the database
